## Confections.ConfectionData type

Discriminated union of all confection data types. Use this when working with raw confection data.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ConfectionData = IMoldedBonBon | IBarTruffle | IRolledTruffle;
```
**References:** [IMoldedBonBon](./ts-chocolate.confections.imoldedbonbon.md)<!-- -->, [IBarTruffle](./ts-chocolate.confections.ibartruffle.md)<!-- -->, [IRolledTruffle](./ts-chocolate.confections.irolledtruffle.md)
